result: The R script has been successfully executed. The cleaned and harmonized dataset has been written to 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv' with the following variables: NSID, incwhh14, incwhh15, incwhhcnt14, incwhhcnt15, incwhh16, and incwhh17. The script loaded and merged the four wave datasets, harmonized missing value codes, derived banded income variables for ages 14 and 15, and retained the categorical variables for ages 16 and 17. All variables are properly labeled according to the specified conventions.
